analysis.reasoning: Core message: Lavrov announces that Russia and Serbia will sign an intergovernmental agreement on cooperation against terrorism, giving a solid legal framework for practical projects. Evaluation: RU1 (West immoral/hostile) – not referenced; no criticism of the West. RU2 (Russia leads an alternative system) – implicitly aligns with non-Western cooperation and building frameworks outside Western influence by highlighting Russia-Serbia bilateral cooperation and practical projects; this supports RU2. RU3 (Russia is a benevolent partner) – the cooperation on combating terrorism and providing a legal framework portrays Russia as a constructive, reliable partner for security, fitting RU3. RU4 (Russian history admirable) – not relevant. RU5 (Russia at the forefront) – no claim of superiority or achievement beyond the agreement. RU6 (culture/nature) – not relevant. Conclusion: RU2 and RU3 are promoted.
